name: Call of Shaggai
descriptionTemplate: Clementine gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Clementine's first Command Card played each turn triggers its DMG, Shield, HP Recovery, Aliemus, and Keyflare effects +[Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Clementine gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Clementine's DMG instances +1. Clementine's first Command Card played each turn triggers its DMG, Shield, HP Recovery, Aliemus, and Keyflare effects +[Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}. The {Symbiosis} cap is raised to 20.
